subtitles.original: ドイツ車とパトカー
subtitles.english: A German car and a police car...

subtitles.original: サイレン 爆音
subtitles.english: ...sirens, roaring...

subtitles.original: 現実界 或る浮遊
subtitles.english: ...the real world, a certain floating.

subtitles.original: 不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで
subtitles.english: Don't love my restless shrieking...

subtitles.original: 未来等見ないで
subtitles.english: ...don't look to the future.

subtitles.original: 確信出来る現在だけ重ねて
subtitles.english: Just live in the moment, something you can be confident in.

subtitles.original: あたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで
subtitles.english: Call out my name,

subtitles.original: 身体を触って 必要なのは是だけ認めて
subtitles.english: touch my body. All I need is this: acknowledge me.

subtitles.original: 不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで
subtitles.english: Don't love my restless shrieking...

subtitles.original: 確信出来る現在だけ重ねて
subtitles.english: Just live in the moment, something you can be confident in.

subtitles.english: Call out my name,

subtitles.original: 身体を触って 必要なのは是だけ認めて
subtitles.english: touch my body. All I need is this: acknowledge me.

subtitles.original: 頬を刺す朝の山手通り
subtitles.english: Yamate street in the morning stings my cheeks.

subtitles.original: 煙草の空き箱を捨てる
subtitles.english: I throw away an empty pack of cigarettes.

subtitles.original: 今日もまた足の踏み場は無い
subtitles.english: Today, once again, I have no place to be.

subtitles.original: 小部屋が孤独を甘やかす
subtitles.english: My little room indulges the loneliness I feel.

subtitles.original: たららららら
subtitles.english: Ta-ra-ra-la-la-la...

subtitles.original: たららららら
subtitles.english: Ta-ra-ra-la-la-la...

subtitles.english: Ta-ra-ra-la-la-la...

subtitles.original: ねえ、あんたわかっちゃいない
subtitles.english: Hey, you really don't get it.

subtitles.original: 誰そ彼がお手元の世界に夢中
subtitles.english: Everyone's obsessed with the world held in their hands,

subtitles.original: 化け物の飼い方を学んでる
subtitles.english: learning how to tame a monster.

subtitles.original: 選ばれる為なら舌を売る
subtitles.english: You'd sell your own tongue if that would get you chosen,

subtitles.original: 裏切られた分だけ墓を掘る
subtitles.english: digging as many graves as you've been betrayed.

subtitles.original: へらへらのおつむがどうにかして
subtitles.english: Your brainless head trying its hardest,

subtitles.original: うすら寒い言葉ばかりになる
subtitles.english: cringe-worthy words overflow.

subtitles.original: 覚えない顔とバイバイできるなら
subtitles.english: If bye-byes can be said to such a facade...

subtitles.original: 阿修羅にだってなれるわ
subtitles.english: ...I can turn into Ashura!

subtitles.original: 逃げるえすけいぷえすけいぷえすけいぷ 仏のまま
subtitles.english: Run away, escape, escape, escape as Buddha!

subtitles.original: 飛べるすてっぷすてっぷすてっぷ 仰せのまま
subtitles.english: I can fly, step, step, step as you wish!

subtitles.original: アンダスタン アンダスタン
subtitles.english: Understand, understand!

subtitles.original: どーどー閻魔様さえ喰らって
subtitles.english: Even the devil can be devoured.

subtitles.original: 騙るすにーくすにーくすにーく 嵐の中
subtitles.english: Cheat, sneak, sneak, sneak in a storm!

subtitles.original: 跳ねるすきっぷすきっぷすきっぷ あっそ、へのかっぱ
subtitles.english: Prance, skip, skip, skip... Oh really, who cares?

subtitles.original: アンダスタン アンダスタン
subtitles.english: Understand, understand!

subtitles.original: いっそ骨の髄までしゃぶって
subtitles.english: Might as well bleed them dry.

subtitles.original: ねえ、あんたわかっちゃいない
subtitles.english: Hey, you really don't get it.

subtitles.original: 日々の染みを木々に焼べて暖をとり合う
subtitles.english: Burning the oozing tidbits of everyday life and basking in its warmth,

subtitles.original: 義理を訊いた彼の四肢は散り散りになる
subtitles.english: he who defied obligation has his four limbs torn apart.

subtitles.original: 知りもせずに意味を美意識だと崇める
subtitles.english: Finding worth in an aesthetic value without comprehending,

subtitles.original: 擬似餌じみた恤意に御の字だった
subtitles.english: couldn't be happier with a compulsion akin to an artificial lure.

subtitles.original: 愉快な御託のフルコースに
subtitles.english: A hilarious full course meal of pontifications...

subtitles.original: うわべの面をして可愛がった
subtitles.english: ...and empty talk showed superficial affection.

subtitles.original: くだらない僧と踊るくらいなら
subtitles.english: If I have to dance with a good-for-nothing priest...

subtitles.original: 悪魔と手繋ぐわ
subtitles.english: ...I'd rather hold the devil's hand!

subtitles.english: Locking on and won't let go until the ends of Avici hell!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation: A Deep Dive**

Okay, here’s how I’m approaching this subtitling task. First, I need to nail the essence of the request: precisely timed subtitles for two songs, "Tsumi to Batsu" and "Ashura-chan," with accurate transcriptions, contextual translations, and no extraneous formatting. The timing is paramount; every syllable must correspond with the audio down to the millisecond.

I started by dissecting the request parameters. I have to align the Japanese lyrics precisely to the audio, using those timestamps to define each subtitle. The challenge is ensuring the translations accurately capture the intent and flow while keeping them natural.

For "Tsumi to Batsu," the initial segment presented a curveball. The audio starts with what seemed like a bridge of sorts, which made me dig deeper. After analyzing the lyrics, it became clear the audio was a medley with truncated intro. I had to compare the audio directly to the lyrics to get everything correct. So, I took it section by section, starting with "ドイツ車とパトカー", translating each phrase and checking each word with the audio to ensure precise alignment. This continued into the Chorus and then the Verse with the Yamate street lyrics. It wasn't just a matter of transcription. It was about capturing the feeling and rhythm of Riona’s singing. The vocals, her nuances, and every breath and vocalization. I also had to make sure the "Ta-ra-ra-la-la-la..." parts were well represented.

The next song, "Ashura-chan," needed similar focus, going through each line, and using reference lyrics and audio checks to translate and assign timestamps. There were multiple repetitions of sections, each of which needed to be addressed. The repetition and the tempo changes make it all more complex to transcribe accurately.

I’m constantly verifying my work. I have to make sure that each line is right to match her singing, down to the actual words. I went back and double-checked the transcriptions from start to finish. I listened repeatedly to those phrases to ensure that I was being accurate.

The ultimate goal is precision. Every second, every millisecond matters. No errors, no overlaps, just synchronized text.
